string 2:
Hmm... I thought maybe I'd find something to go on, but I
guess the guy's not so careless.
{next}What are you looking for?
{next}I saw your Digiline message.
{next}Stop! Thief!

Some sort of lead on Digimon! That's why I was looking
through Inori's pop's desk.
Oh, great! Thanks! I was just searching Inori's pop's desk.

I-I'm no thief! How dare you slander me like that! I was
just checking Inori's pop's desk!

He's investigating anomalous phenomena, so I thought I'd
find some leads for my streams.

But no such luck! I'm just going to have to do this the hard
way.
So, what do you say? Can you lend me a hand?
{next}Lend you a hand with what?
{next}That depends. Can you pay me?
{next}I want to hear about the job first.
With investigating an anomalous phenomenon! What else?

Well, aren't you shrewd? Don't worry. You'll be properly
compensated for your work.

Ooh, talk about cagey! But that's okay. I don't mind filling
you in.

I'm looking into something for my next stream that ought to
be of interest to you, too.

There's a store in the shopping district with T-shirts on
display that keep getting stolen.

It's happened so many times now, it got me thinking... What
if a ghost is behind it?
{next}You think a ghost is stealing T-shirts?
{next}Are there any witnesses?
{next}Hmm... Is that a new T-shirt you're wearing?

Okay, there's no proof, but the area's always busy. A human
would've been caught by now.

Not a single one! And in a crowded shopping district, too.
Pretty fishy, right?

I'm no thief! Besides, the T-shirts that place sells aren't
even my style!

Look. I know there's no solid lead, but it's clear these are
no ordinary thefts.
So, you'll help me investigate, right?
{next}For you, Hiroko? I'm happy to help out.
{next}Anything to make people's lives easier.
{end}Sorry. I'm a little busy right now.

That's the spirit! Think of the good you'll do me, the
people at the shop... everyone!

Are you? Well, let me know if you're ever free to lend a
hand.
Ready to help me uncover the mystery of the stolen T-shirts?
{next}Yeah.
{end}Sorry. I'm a little busy right now.
Great! That's just what I've been waiting to hear!

Let's not waste any time. We should head straight for the
clothing store now!

Are you? Well, let me know if you're ever free to lend a
hand.

Oh, Hiroko! It's you. How do you like these jeans? Stylish,
right?

Sorry, but I'm not here to shop today. Can you tell me more
about the T-shirt thefts?

Ah, right... Well, it's like the shirts move on their own.
They fly right out of the shop!

You're sure they move on their own? That'd be absolutely
HUGE for fans of the paranormal.

They do! I swear! It happened just now, so I started yelling
that the thief was back.

Then this young man said he'd catch them, and went running
out that way after the shirt.

He sounds like he's on to something. That way leads to an
alley... Come on. Let's go!

*panting*... S-Some weird monster just went down that
manhole, along with a T-shirt...!
Over there, right? Let's go check it out!

Hehehe... Now, how do I make this just scream "the
Twentiest"?

Yes! Caught you red-handed! This image is sure to make for a
great scoop!
Huh?! Are you two the Twentiest?!
The Twentiest? What's that supposed to mean?

It's mostly a vibe, so it's hard to explain. How would you
make this shirt the Twentiest?
{next}Tear it up.
{next}Soak it in sewage.
{next}Twentiest it.

So, that's what the Twentiest is to you? In that case, I'll
tear YOU up!

So, that's what the Twentiest is to you? In that case, I'll
soak YOU in sewage!

Why, you...! Think you're funny, huh? Well, the Twentiest is
not to be taken so lightly!
My Twentiest...

That solves the case of the stolen T-shirts, but also raises
the mystery of the Twentiest.

First things first, though. Let's get out of these sewers.
They REEK...

I'm... not sure I understand, but you're saying the T-shirt
thefts are over?

What a relief! I've been so worried. Come back any time and
I'll give you a discount!

Case closed! You know, it feels good to have done something
to keep this district running.

That "Twentiest" thing is still a mystery to me, but at
least I got to see something cool!

But here. This is for you. My way of saying thanks for your
help.

Oh, no! The picture's so blurry, you can't see anything!
Ugh. I gotta up my camera game.
